heading: Purpose
label: 1651 Purpose
text: The purpose of this subchapter is to establish programs in urban centers to make health services more accessible to urban Indians.
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior section 1651, , , ; , , , related to Congressional statement of purpose, prior to the general revision of this subchapter by .Pub. L. 94–437, title V, § 50190 Stat. 1410Pub. L. 96–537, § 794 Stat. 3176Pub. L. 100–713Sept. 30, 1976Dec. 17, 1980
